title: pouteria polysepala
intro: Pouteria polysepala, also known as the Hawaiian white wood or white wood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pouteria polysepala include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Pouteria polysepala include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
